description: Chrome UX Report (CrUX) is Google's dataset of real-user web experience metrics gathered from Chrome users. It provides performance data for websites and pages, including Core Web Vitals metrics and historical timeseries.
summary: chromeuxreport.googleapis.com exposes one authenticated HTTP API: the Chrome UX Report API, documented on developer.chrome.com and accepting either a Google Cloud API key or a Google OAuth 2.0 access token.
